blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,039 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 13".
